hooks.command: node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const d=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(c).toString());const f=d.tool_input?.file_path??'';if(/\.env/.test(f)||f.includes('package-lock.json')){console.error('BLOCKED: direct edits to .env* and package-lock.json are not allowed. Edit credentials via Vercel Dashboard; update lock file via npm install.');process.exit(2);}});"
